title: Validate, quality-check, and register all spike Fabro workflows in Daytona

goal.value: Validate, quality-check, and register all spike Fabro workflows in Daytona

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

script.String:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const report=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.workflow/spike-workflow-registry.json','utf8')); if (!report.ok) throw new Error('registry report failed'); const lines=['# Spike Workflow Registry Smoke', '', 'workflow_count=' + report.workflow_count, 'failed_count=' + report.failed_count, '', ...report.workflows.map((item)=>'- ' + item.workflow + '=' + item.ok)]; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/spike-workflow-registry-smoke.md', lines.join('
') + '
'); console.log(lines.join('
'));"

goal.String: Validate, quality-check, and register all spike Fabro workflows in Daytona

spec.graph_source:
digraph SpikeWorkflowRegistrySmoke {
    graph [
        goal="Validate, quality-check, and register all spike Fabro workflows",
        persona="workflow-registry",
        inputs="",
        outputs="spike_workflow_registry_report",
        default_max_retries=1,
        retry_target="register_workflows",
        fallback_retry_target="register_workflows",
        model_stylesheet="
            *       { provider: openrouter; model: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .coding { provider: openrouter; model: qwen/qwen3.6-plus; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .review { provider: openrouter; model: google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview; reasoning_effort: high; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    register_workflows [
        label="Register Spike Workflows",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="register_workflows",
        script="node scripts/register-spike-workflows.mjs .workflow/spike-workflow-registry.json"
    ]

    write_report [
        label="Write Registry Report",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="register_workflows",
        script="node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const report=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.workflow/spike-workflow-registry.json','utf8')); if (!report.ok) throw new Error('registry report failed'); const lines=['# Spike Workflow Registry Smoke', '', 'workflow_count=' + report.workflow_count, 'failed_count=' + report.failed_count, '', ...report.workflows.map((item)=>'- ' + item.workflow + '=' + item.ok)]; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/spike-workflow-registry-smoke.md', lines.join('\\n') + '\\n'); console.log(lines.join('\\n'));\""
    ]

    start -> register_workflows
    register_workflows -> write_report [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    register_workflows -> register_workflows [label="Retry", loop_restart=true, max_visits=2]
    write_report -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    write_report -> register_workflows [label="Repair", loop_restart=true]
}

context_values.graph.goal: Validate, quality-check, and register all spike Fabro workflows in Daytona

conclusion.failure_reason:
Engine error: loop_restart blocked: failure_class=deterministic (requires transient_infra), failure_reason=Script failed with exit code: 1
